welcome:
Hi! I'll help you pick a movie for tonight.

Press the button below and I'll ask you a few questions about your mood.
q0: What do you want to watch?
q1: Question 1 of 3 Do you want to think or just relax? 1 — just want to relax 5 — I love complex plots, want to think
q2: Question 2 of 3 Do you want to laugh or feel? 1 — I want something touching or intense 5 — I want to laugh and have fun
q3: Question 3 of 3 New releases or classics? 1 — classics (before 2000) 5 — something fresh (after 2010)
no_movies: Couldn't find movies matching your criteria. Want to try again?
no_more_movies: No more movies for this search. Try a new search!
error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
